title: Actions
subtitle: Run tasks on your devices and review results

integration.label: Integration
integration.tooltip: Integration module that provides this action

device.label: Device
device.tooltip: The resource identifier to act on (container ID, VM name, etc.)

previewOnly.label: Preview Only
previewOnly.tooltip: Simulate the action without making changes

empty.title: No runs yet
empty.description: Pick an integration and action above, then hit Run.

updates.title: Updates
updates.subtitle: Schedule and run updates across your lab

devices.label: Devices
devices.tooltip: Comma-separated list of device hostnames to update

plansEmpty.title: No update plans yet
plansEmpty.description: Create a plan above to define which devices and scopes to update.

runsEmpty.title: No update runs yet
runsEmpty.description: Execute a plan to start a run.
